rationale: Gov't Code §2306.027 governs board member eligibility for a housing department board. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 2306.027. ELIGIBILITY. (a) The governor shall appoint to the board public members who have a demonstrated interest in issues related to housing and community support services.
_note: Rule text concerns board appointment eligibility; wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
